description: Environmental engineers at a petrochemical refinery detected a sustained benzene leak in a vapor recovery unit. John Zenon, a refinery worker, was exposed and presents with fatigue and pallor. As the occupational health physician, complete the benzene toxicity medical surveillance protocol in GNU Health for John Zenon. Document the toxic effect of benzene (T52.1 or D61.x) as an active condition, perform a clinical evaluation, order at least three hematology-related labs, prescribe a supportive vitamin or hematinic, and schedule a follow-up appointment for a hematology results review between 7 and 14 days from today. Login with username: admin and password: gnusolidario.
